# Emmy STACK01
Digital service provider and creator of high-performance micro-SaaS tools.

## Key Products & Tools
- [Digital Business Card](https://emmystack01.com/products/digital-business-card): Custom digital identity profiles.
- [Emmy Sign](https://emmystack01.com/tools/emmy-sign): Local, secure browser-based PDF signature utility.
- [Meeting Background Studio](https://emmystack01.com/tools/meeting-background-studio): Professional virtual backgrounds generator.
- [Naira-wise](https://emmystack01.com/tools/naira-wise): Dynamic web-based invoice generation tool.
- [Website Auditor](https://emmystack01.com/tools/website-auditor): Technical performance and architecture review tool.
- [Social Architect](https://emmystack01.com/tools/social-architect): Micro-SaaS optimization utility.
